tasks.title: Create crates/file/Cargo.toml with all dependencies
tasks.description: Create crates/file/Cargo.toml with all required dependencies including: notify = "6", tokio with fs, sync, rt, time features, walkdir = "2", filedescriptor = "0.6", thiserror = "2.0", tracing, anyhow, tempfile (dev), tokio-test (dev)
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure Cargo.toml parses correctly with cargo metadata
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify all dependency versions are valid and resolvable
tasks.impl_notes: Use edition = "2021", follow existing crate patterns in workspace

tasks.title: Create crates/file/src/lib.rs with module declarations and public exports
tasks.description: Create crates/file/src/lib.rs with module declarations (error, service, normalize, watch, copy) and public exports for all public types and functions
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure lib.rs compiles and exports are accessible
RunTestSuite: cargo check -p opencode-file
tasks.impl_notes: Declare all modules pub mod xxx; and re-export public types

tasks.title: Implement FileError enum with 7 variants
tasks.description: Implement FileError enum in crates/file/src/error.rs with 7 variants: NotFound(PathBuf), NotAFile(PathBuf), NotADirectory(PathBuf), Io { context: String, source: std::io::Error }, Watch(String), WatchNotFound(String), PathTooLong(PathBuf). Use thiserror = "2.0" derive macros.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify each FileError variant can be constructed and displayed
AddErrorHandlingTest: test error propagation and Display formatting
tasks.impl_notes: Use #[derive(Error, Debug)] with thiserror, implement From<std::io::Error> for FileError::Io

tasks.title: Implement FileService struct with watcher registry
tasks.description: Implement FileService struct with watcher registry: watch_handles: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, notify::RecommendedWatcher>>>. Include new() constructor and internal methods.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify FileService can be instantiated with new()
AddErrorHandlingTest: test thread-safety of watch_handles registry
tasks.impl_notes: FileService should manage watcher lifecycle, store watchers by watch_id string

tasks.title: Implement normalize() function - collapse dot components
tasks.description: Implement normalize() function in crates/file/src/normalize.rs - collapse . components, handle .., fix separators. No filesystem access. Example: /a/b/../c/./d → /a/c/d
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify normalize() collapses dot components (/a/b/./c → /a/b/c)
AddUnitTest: verify normalize() handles parent directory references (/a/b/../c → /a/c)
AddUnitTest: verify normalize() fixes separators (handling platform differences)
AddErrorHandlingTest: test edge cases like excess .. components
tasks.impl_notes: Pure function, no I/O. Handle both / and \ separators. Return PathBuf.

tasks.title: Implement resolve_path(base, relative) function
tasks.description: Implement resolve_path(base, relative) function - resolve relative path against base, make absolute. Does NOT resolve symlinks. Return absolute normalized path.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify resolve_path handles simple relative paths (./foo → /base/foo)
AddUnitTest: verify resolve_path handles parent references in relative (../foo → /parent/foo)
AddErrorHandlingTest: test resolve_path with various base path formats
tasks.impl_notes: Combines base with relative, then normalizes. Does not access filesystem.

tasks.title: Implement canonicalize() async function
tasks.description: Implement canonicalize() async function - resolve symlinks, make absolute, requires path to exist. Return FileError::Io on failure. Uses tokio::fs::symlink_metadata and path methods.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify canonicalize() resolves symlinks correctly
AddUnitTest: verify canonicalize() makes path absolute
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::Io is returned for non-existent paths
AddRegressionTest: ensure canonicalize works with broken symlinks
tasks.impl_notes: Async function, uses tokio::fs functions. Requires path to exist.

tasks.title: Implement normalize_path() public API
tasks.description: Implement normalize_path() public API - combines normalization strategies, platform-aware, produces consistent absolute paths. This is the main public entry point for path normalization.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify normalize_path() returns consistent absolute paths
AddUnitTest: verify normalize_path() is platform-aware
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-file normalize
tasks.impl_notes: Should handle both relative and absolute inputs, always return absolute normalized path

tasks.title: Implement Debouncer struct for event collapsing
tasks.description: Implement Debouncer struct with delay: Duration, pending: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<PathBuf, tokio::time::Sleep>>>, queue() method to collapse rapid events. Thread-safe via Arc<Mutex<...>>.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Debouncer can be instantiated with delay
AddUnitTest: verify Debouncer::queue() collapses rapid events for same path
AddErrorHandlingTest: test thread-safety with concurrent access
tasks.impl_notes: Debouncer should cancel previous pending sleep for same path when new event arrives

tasks.title: Implement watch() method on FileService
tasks.description: Implement watch() method on FileService - use notify::RecommendedWatcher, generate unique watch_id string, store watcher in registry, support debouncing. Return WatchId string.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify watch() registers watcher and returns unique watch_id
AddUnitTest: verify callback fires when watched file changes
AddIntegrationTest: verify debouncing works with rapid file changes
tasks.impl_notes: Use notify::RecommendedWatcher, store in watch_handles HashMap by watch_id

tasks.title: Implement unwatch() method on FileService
tasks.description: Implement unwatch() method on FileService - stop watcher by watch_id, remove from registry. Return FileError::WatchNotFound if not found.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify unwatch() removes watcher from registry
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::WatchNotFound returned for invalid watch_id
tasks.impl_notes: Should call watcher.watcher().stop() before removing from HashMap

tasks.title: Implement exists() async function
tasks.description: Implement exists() async function - fast existence check. Return true if path exists, false otherwise. No error on missing path.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify exists() returns true for existing file
AddUnitTest: verify exists() returns false for non-existent path
AddErrorHandlingTest: test exists() does not throw error on missing path
tasks.impl_notes: Use tokio::fs::metadata or similar, catch error and return false

tasks.title: Implement create_dir_all() async function
tasks.description: Implement create_dir_all() async function - recursive directory creation like mkdir -p. Use tokio::fs::create_dir_all. Return success or FileError::Io.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify create_dir_all() creates nested directories
AddUnitTest: verify create_dir_all() succeeds silently if directories exist
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::Io returned on permission errors
tasks.impl_notes: Use tokio::fs::create_dir_all, map io::Error to FileError::Io

tasks.title: Implement remove_file() async function
tasks.description: Implement remove_file() async function - delete a file (not directory). Return FileError::NotFound if path does not exist. Return FileError::NotAFile if path is a directory.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify remove_file() deletes existing file
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::NotFound for non-existent paths
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::NotAFile when path is a directory
tasks.impl_notes: Check if path exists first, then check if it's a file (not directory)

tasks.title: Implement copy_file() async function
tasks.description: Implement copy_file() async function - check source exists (FileError::NotFound if missing), create parent directories via tokio::fs::create_dir_all, copy file via tokio::fs::copy. Return bytes copied. Map errors to FileError::Io.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify copy_file() copies file and returns byte count
AddUnitTest: verify copy_file() creates parent directories automatically
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::NotFound for missing source
tasks.impl_notes: Use tokio::fs::copy for actual copy, create parent dirs first

tasks.title: Implement copy_dir() async function
tasks.description: Implement copy_dir() async function - use walkdir::WalkDir for recursive traversal, preserve directory structure, copy all files respecting permissions. Return total bytes copied. Return FileError::NotADirectory if source is not a directory.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify copy_dir() recursively copies directory tree
AddUnitTest: verify copy_dir() preserves directory structure
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::NotADirectory when source is a file
tasks.impl_notes: Use WalkDir::new().into_iter(), skip directories, copy files preserving structure

tasks.title: Write unit test test_watch_fires_callback_on_file_change
tasks.description: Write unit test test_watch_fires_callback_on_file_change - verify watch() registers watcher and callback fires on file change
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify watch() registers watcher successfully
AddIntegrationTest: verify callback is invoked when watched file changes
tasks.impl_notes: Create temp file, watch it, modify file, verify callback fired with correct path

tasks.title: Write unit test test_debouncer_merges_rapid_events
tasks.description: Write unit test test_debouncer_merges_rapid_events - verify multiple rapid events collapse to single callback
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify multiple rapid events on same path collapse to single callback
tasks.impl_notes: Simulate rapid events (within delay window), verify only one callback invocation

tasks.title: Write unit test test_copy_file_creates_parent_dirs
tasks.description: Write unit test test_copy_file_creates_parent_dirs - verify copy_file() creates parent directories and returns byte count
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify copy_file() creates nested parent directories
AddUnitTest: verify correct byte count is returned
tasks.impl_notes: Copy to path like /tmp/test/nested/deep/file.txt, verify directories created

tasks.title: Write unit test test_copy_dir_recursive
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify copy_dir() copies all nested files and subdirectories
AddUnitTest: verify directory structure is preserved
tasks.impl_notes: Create source tree with nested dirs/files, copy, verify structure matches

tasks.title: Write unit test test_normalize_collapse_dots
tasks.description: Write unit test test_normalize_collapse_dots - verify normalize() collapses dot components
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify normalize() collapses . components (/a/b/./c → /a/b/c)
AddUnitTest: verify normalize() handles multiple consecutive dots
tasks.impl_notes: Test various dot combinations including ./ ../ and combinations

tasks.title: Write unit test test_canonicalize_resolves_symlinks
tasks.description: Write unit test test_canonicalize_resolves_symlinks - verify canonicalize() resolves symlinks and makes absolute
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify canonicalize() resolves symlinks to real path
AddUnitTest: verify canonicalize() returns absolute path
tasks.impl_notes: Create symlink, canonicalize it, verify result is real path

tasks.title: Write unit test test_resolve_path_relative
tasks.description: Write unit test test_resolve_path_relative - verify resolve_path() handles relative paths correctly
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify resolve_path() resolves ./ relative paths
AddUnitTest: verify resolve_path() resolves ../ relative paths
AddUnitTest: verify resolve_path() combines base and relative correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Test various combinations of base paths and relative paths

tasks.title: Write unit test test_create_dir_all_async
tasks.description: Write unit test test_create_dir_all_async - verify create_dir_all() creates nested directories
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify create_dir_all() creates deeply nested directory structure
AddUnitTest: verify create_dir_all() succeeds if directory already exists
tasks.impl_notes: Test creating 5+ levels deep directory structure

tasks.title: Write unit test test_exists_returns_bool
tasks.description: Write unit test test_exists_returns_bool - verify exists() returns bool without throwing errors
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify exists() returns true for existing file
AddUnitTest: verify exists() returns false for non-existent path
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify exists() does not throw error for missing path
tasks.impl_notes: Test with file, directory, and non-existent paths

tasks.title: Write unit test test_remove_file_not_found
tasks.description: Write unit test test_remove_file_not_found - verify remove_file() returns NotFound error for non-existent paths
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::NotFound returned for non-existent path
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify FileError::NotAFile returned when path is directory
tasks.impl_notes: Test error cases for remove_file function
